title: Testimonials | Brown Immigration Law
content:
Cannot recommend Brown Immigration Law enough! Attorney, Aleksander Cuic, and Case Manager, Anhelina Fedoriv, were both fantastic throughout the entire process, always being available for our questions or concerns. Anhelina, specifically, was extremely communicative and always got back to us in a timely manner. We are very happy with the service we...
Cannot recommend Brown Immigration Law enough! Attorney, Aleksander Cuic, and Case Manager, Anhelina Fedoriv, were both fantastic throughout the entire process, always being available for our questions or concerns. Anhelina, specifically, was extremely communicative and always got back to us in a timely manner. We are very happy with the service we received and would recommend to anyone looking for assistance with immigrations matters.
I experience a excellent journey with Brown Immigration law firm, the professionalism and dedication made this journey possible, a special thanks to Maritza Zuniga our case attorney for the hard work and dedication and commitment throughout this process. I recommend Brown Law firms
My Peruvian husband and I got engaged while living in Peru and knew we wanted legal support for the process of moving to the USA together. Our experience was awesome from the very first time we contacted Brown Immigration just to start asking preliminary questions to understand the process. We worked with Erin Brown and Noelle Baker and they made t...
My Peruvian husband and I got engaged while living in Peru and knew we wanted legal support for the process of moving to the USA together. Our experience was awesome from the very first time we contacted Brown Immigration just to start asking preliminary questions to understand the process. We worked with Erin Brown and Noelle Baker and they made the long, potentially stressful process easy and worry-free. It felt good knowing they had our back and kept everything organized and professional for us. Thank you all!
I am very thankful and impressed with Brown Immigration. Attorney Kelly Urbano and case manager Andrea Fernandez are both very knowledgeable, efficient and professional. They helped my wife through the green card process. From the initial consultation meeting to obtaining the green card I always felt the process was in experienced hands. They were ...
I am very thankful and impressed with Brown Immigration. Attorney Kelly Urbano and case manager Andrea Fernandez are both very knowledgeable, efficient and professional. They helped my wife through the green card process. From the initial consultation meeting to obtaining the green card I always felt the process was in experienced hands. They were always available to answer any questions or give us clarification on something. Always friendly and responsive.They guided us through each step. Their process was highly organized and detailed. What could have been a very stressful experience both Kelly and Andrea made the process manageable and gave us peace of mind. Each case is different, but to our surprise my wife received the green card much sooner than anticipated. I highly recommend Brown Immigration.
Brown immigration helped me out through attorney Kelly. I didn't know how to deal with immigration issues, so I turned to her. She was very receptive and understanding of my problem. She and her case manager, Olga Nieves, took the time to treat my case carefully. The case manager kept all my documents organized and continuously updated me about my ...
Brown immigration helped me out through attorney Kelly. I didn't know how to deal with immigration issues, so I turned to her. She was very receptive and understanding of my problem. She and her case manager, Olga Nieves, took the time to treat my case carefully. The case manager kept all my documents organized and continuously updated me about my case. Details after detail, they achieved an outstanding result. If you want to deal with the immigration process stress, look no further; attorney Kelly is here and will fight for you until you get the expected results. I'm thrilled to have met his path. She is of immeasurable help. I will highly recommend attorney Kelly for all of your immigration issues.
I had an excellent experience working with Melissa and Attorney Jenna. They were very knowledgeable and provided clear explanations for every step in the process. They were always quick to respond to any questions I had and made my decision more comfortable. They are the immigration law firm to look for!
If we could give you 10 stars we would! Thanks to our case manager Noelle Baker & Attorney Alexa Stovksy & Attorney Erin Brown, our adjustment of status case was approved in less than 7 months!!! I am the type that asks a lot of questions, Noelle has answered them all in a timely fashion. I would definitely recommend your firm to anyone tha...
If we could give you 10 stars we would! Thanks to our case manager Noelle Baker & Attorney Alexa Stovksy & Attorney Erin Brown, our adjustment of status case was approved in less than 7 months!!! I am the type that asks a lot of questions, Noelle has answered them all in a timely fashion. I would definitely recommend your firm to anyone that needs the type of services you provide. Thank you all for your help on this journey! ❤️❤️❤️
It was an honor working with attorney Kelly Urbano and Andrea Fernandez. Whenever i had a question or a concern they would not hesitate to answer it. My case took only 6 months!!
